message.content: Set up rate limiting middleware with Redis
I'll implement a sliding window rate limiter using Redis sorted sets. This gives more accurate rate limiting than fixed windows. Let me create the middleware and the Redis adapter.
Can we make it configurable per route?
Absolutely. I'll add a route-level configuration that lets you set different limits per endpoint. For example, /auth/login can have stricter limits than /api/products.
Also add IP-based and API-key-based limiting
I'll support both strategies. IP-based for public endpoints, API-key-based for authenticated routes. The middleware will check headers and fall back to IP if no key is present.
